form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months ran last of 9 at Santa Anita on March 13 over 1106m, 16 len behind Hey Brother carrying 55.5kg at $24.20. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at this track on January 26 2025 over 914m, on heavy track; 4.5 len behind Where's The Loot with 57kg at $2.90. Solid top-three hope.
